title: C69 · Held-Out Gate Rejects the Tuned Claim

story.text:
# 💡 C69 · Held-Out Gate Rejects the Tuned Claim
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Self-chosen probes are not knowledge; trust requires an adversarial held-out gate (Fiat-Shamir) the claimant cannot tune — the nonce-island mirage. C13 at the validation layer. Active (60%).
